offer.name: Talent as a Service - AI Data Cloud Software Cyber - US LATAM
offer.targetCustomer: CTOs, CIOs, VP Engineering, VP Data, Head of AI, Founders, Co-Founders at Series A+ startups and mid-market companies (50-5000 employees) in the US and Latin America who are actively hiring AI Engineers, Data Engineers, Cloud Engineers, Software Engineers, or Cyber Security talent
offer.customerProblem: Engineering teams cannot fill critical AI, Data, Cloud, Software, and Cyber Security roles fast enough. Average time-to-fill is 3-4 months, creating delivery delays, missed product deadlines, and frustrated leadership
offer.whyNow: Companies posting active job listings for these roles right now — signal detected via Apollo.io hiring data. The longer positions remain unfilled, the higher the cost of delay
offer.customerAlternative: Traditional recruiters (expensive, slow), internal recruiting (overwhelmed), offshore dev shops (quality concerns), or leaving positions unfilled
offer.observableSuccess: Roles filled within 2-4 weeks instead of 3-4 months. Engineers integrated and productive within first sprint
offer.valueProp: CirrusLabs places pre-vetted AI, Data, Cloud, Software, and Cyber Security engineers in 2-4 weeks — not months — with a quality guarantee
offer.differentiators: Pre-vetted talent pool ready to deploy, 2-4 week placement vs 3-4 month industry average, engineers productive from day one, US + LATAM talent for cost optimization, quality guarantee with replacement policy
offer.salesModel: Signal-driven outbound: detect hiring signals, reach decision-makers, offer faster alternative. No cold spray-and-pray
offer.objectionHandlers: Q: How is this different from other staffing firms? A: We start with pre-vetted candidates matched to your stack, not a job posting. Q: What about cultural fit? A: Our engineers work embedded in your team with your tools and processes. Q: Pricing? A: Competitive with direct hire total cost, but 10x faster
offer.goToMarket: Automated signal detection via Apollo.io → personalized email outreach referencing specific hiring signals → LinkedIn follow-up for warm leads → demo call → placement
offer.pricingPackaging: Monthly retainer model for ongoing placements. Single placement option available. Volume discounts for 3+ concurrent engineers
offer.successStories: Placed 5 Data Engineers at a Series B fintech in 3 weeks. Filled a CTO search for a healthcare startup in 2 weeks. Scaled an AI team from 2 to 8 engineers in 6 weeks for a logistics company

campaign.name: Hiring AI Data Cloud Software Cyber Engineers Q1 2026
campaign.signalHypothesis: Companies actively hiring AI Engineers, Data Engineers, Cloud Engineers, Software Engineers, or Cyber Security talent in the US and Latin America
campaign.detectionMethod: Apollo.io organization search filtering by active job postings for engineering roles, combined with employee count and funding stage filters
campaign.messagingFramework: PVP (Problem-Value-Proof) — lead with the hiring pain, offer faster placement, prove with metrics
campaign.targetGeography: United States, Brazil, Mexico, Colombia, Argentina
campaign.buyerFilters: CTO, CIO, VP Engineering, VP Data, Head of AI, Founder, Co-Founder
